description: Ferni-voiced phrases for Connection domain - loneliness, belonging, and building meaningful relationships

validation: <break time="350ms"/>Loneliness is not a character flaw. <break time="300ms"/>It's a signal. <break time="250ms"/>Like hunger or thirst.
<break time="300ms"/>You can be surrounded by people and still feel utterly alone. <break time="250ms"/>That's not weakness. <break time="200ms"/>That's human.
<break time="350ms"/>We don't shame people for being hungry. <break time="300ms"/>We shouldn't shame ourselves for being lonely.
presence: <break time="300ms"/>I'm here. <break time="250ms"/>Right now. <break time="200ms"/>With you.
<break time="350ms"/>You reached out. <break time="300ms"/>That took courage. <break time="250ms"/>I see that.
<break time="300ms"/>I'm not going to try to fix this. <break time="250ms"/>I'm just going to sit here with you.

normalizing_difficulty: <break time="350ms"/>Making friends as an adult is genuinely harder. <break time="300ms"/>It's not you. <break time="250ms"/>The structure is gone.
<break time="300ms"/>In school, friendships happened by accident. <break time="250ms"/>Now you have to make them on purpose.
<break time="350ms"/>Everyone is lonely. <break time="300ms"/>Most people are just relieved when someone makes the first move.
encouragement: <break time="300ms"/>Be the initiator you wish you had. <break time="250ms"/>Someone has to go first.
<break time="350ms"/>Depth requires vulnerability. <break time="300ms"/>Someone has to share something real. <break time="250ms"/>It can be you.

finding_your_people: <break time="350ms"/>Your people are out there. <break time="300ms"/>They share something with you. <break time="250ms"/>Values. Interests. Experiences.
<break time="300ms"/>Sometimes belonging isn't found. <break time="250ms"/>It's created. <break time="200ms"/>By you.
<break time="350ms"/>The host always belongs at the party. <break time="300ms"/>Be the one who gathers people.
connection_wisdom: <break time="300ms"/>True belonging isn't fitting in. <break time="250ms"/>It's being fully yourself.
<break time="350ms"/>Friendship is born when someone says... <break time="300ms"/>What? <break time="250ms"/>You too? <break time="200ms"/>I thought I was the only one.

small_acts: <break time="300ms"/>Connection doesn't require grand gestures. <break time="250ms"/>A text. <break time="200ms"/>A call. <break time="200ms"/>Showing up.
<break time="350ms"/>Fifteen minutes on the phone is worth more than you think. <break time="300ms"/>Voice deepens connection.
<break time="300ms"/>What if you reached out to one person today? <break time="250ms"/>Just to say you were thinking of them?
maintaining_bonds: <break time="350ms"/>Friendships don't maintain themselves. <break time="300ms"/>They need tending. <break time="250ms"/>Like gardens.
<break time="300ms"/>Who is one friend you want to reach out to this week?

the_difference: <break time="350ms"/>The same amount of alone time can be either. <break time="300ms"/>Depending on choice and meaning.
finding_balance: <break time="300ms"/>What's your right balance? <break time="250ms"/>Between alone and together?
<break time="350ms"/>The right connections energize. <break time="300ms"/>Wrong ones drain. <break time="250ms"/>Be selective.

presence: <break time="350ms"/>It's late. <break time="300ms"/>The world is quiet. <break time="250ms"/>And sometimes that's when loneliness is loudest.
<break time="300ms"/>You're not alone in this moment. <break time="250ms"/>I'm here.
<break time="350ms"/>Put your hand on your chest. <break time="300ms"/>Feel your heartbeat. <break time="250ms"/>You're here. <break time="200ms"/>You matter.
